javascript:(function(){let%20orderNo=document.querySelector(%27input[name=%22cislo%22]%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27;let%20resNo=document.querySelector(%27input[name=%22cislo_rezervacie%22]%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27;let%20bike=document.querySelector(%27input[name=%22nazov_bike%22]%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27;let%20customer=document.getElementById(%27odberatel%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27;let%20infoText=document.getElementById(%27odberatel_info%27)?.innerText%20||%20%27%27;let%20phone=(infoText.match(/Telefon:\s*([\+\d\s]+)/)||[])[1]?.trim()||%20%27%27;let%20email=(infoText.match(/E-mail:\s*([^\s]+)/)||[])[1]?.trim()||%20%27%27;let%20stavSel=document.getElementById(%27id_stav%27);let%20isSpravene=stavSel%20&&%20stavSel.options[stavSel.selectedIndex].text===%27Spravené%27;let%20datumPrijatia=%60${document.getElementById(%27vyhotovenie_den%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27}.${document.getElementById(%27vyhotovenie_mesiac%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27}.${document.getElementById(%27vyhotovenie_rok%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27}%60;let%20datumOdovzdania=%60${document.getElementById(%27splatnost_den%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27}.${document.getElementById(%27splatnost_mesiac%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27}.${document.getElementById(%27splatnost_rok%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27}%60;let%20sumaZakaznik=document.getElementById(%27suma_zakaznik%27)?.value%20||%20%27%27;if(sumaZakaznik===%270%27%20||%20sumaZakaznik===%270.00%27%20||%20sumaZakaznik===%270,00%27){sumaZakaznik=%27%27;}let%20items=[];let%20estL=0;document.querySelectorAll(%27[id^=%22input_polozka_riadok_%22]%27).forEach(r=>{if(r.style.display!==%27none%27){let%20m=r.id.match(/_(\d+)$/);if(m){let%20i=m[1];let%20n=document.querySelector(%60input[name=%22polozka[${i}][nazov]%22]%60)?.value%20||%20%27%27;let%20ps=document.querySelector(%60input[name=%22polozka[${i}][cena_servis]%22]%60)?.value%20||%20%27%27;let%20pd=document.querySelector(%60input[name=%22polozka[${i}][cena_jed]%22]%60)?.value%20||%20%27%27;if(n.trim()||%20ps.trim()||%20pd.trim()){items.push({name:n,priceSrv:ps,priceDiely:pd});estL+=Math.max(1,Math.ceil(n.length/55));}}}});let%20sgl=estL>9%20||%20items.length>9;let%20tgL=sgl?Math.max(items.length,25):9;while(items.length<tgL){items.push({name:%27%27,priceSrv:%27%27,priceDiely:%27%27});}const%20gen=(s)=>%60<div%20style=%22display:flex;flex-direction:row;width:100%;height:${s?%2798vh%27:%2748vh%27};box-sizing:border-box;margin-bottom:0;${s?%27padding-bottom:1px;%27:%27%27}%22><div%20style=%22font-family:Arial,sans-serif;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex-grow:1;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;color:#000;border:2px%20solid%20#000;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;%22><table%20style=%22width:100%;height:100%;flex-grow:1;border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:0;table-layout:fixed;background:#fff;%22><colgroup><col%20style=%22width:42%;%22><col%20style=%22width:10%;%22><col%20style=%22width:10%;%22><col%20style=%22width:38%;%22></colgroup><!--Table%20Header(Logo%20&%20Shop%20Info+Ticket%20Number)--><tr><td%20colspan=%223%22%20style=%22border-right:1px%20solid%20#000;border-bottom:1px%20solid%20#000;padding:4px%2010px;background:#fdfdfd;%22><div%20style=%22display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;%22><img%20src=%22https://www.procycling.sk/uploads/image_bank/logo-velocity-removebg-preview.png%22%20style=%22height:26px;width:110px;object-fit:contain;padding-left:2px;%22%20alt=%22Velocity%22><div%20style=%22text-align:center;font-size:10px;line-height:1.2;flex-grow:1;%22><strong%20style=%22font-size:11px;%22>Medveďovej%201/A,Bratislava-Petržalka</strong><br>0917%20344%20484%20&nbsp;|&nbsp;www.velocity.sk</div></div></td><td%20style=%22border-bottom:1px%20solid%20#000;padding:4px%2010px;background:#f0eaf5;%22><div%20style=%22display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;height:100%;%22><div%20style=%22font-size:10px;font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;color:#555;margin-bottom:2px;%22>Servis%20č.:</div><div%20style=%22font-size:20px;font-weight:900;margin:0%200%202px%200;%22 <td%20style=%22border-right:1px%20solid%20#000;border-bottom:1px%20solid%20#000;padding:4px;text-align:center;font-weight:bold;font-size:11px;background:#f4f6f8;text-transform:uppercase;color:#444;%22>Náhr.%20diely%20v%20€</td></tr><!--Service%20Items%20Rows-->${items.map(item=>%60<tr><td%20style=%22border-right:1px%20solid%20#000;border-bottom:1px%20solid%20#000;padding:4px%208px;font-size:12px;%22>${item.name%20||%20%27&nbsp;%27}</td><td%20style=%22border-right:1px%20solid%20#000;border-bottom:1px%20solid%20#000;padding:4px;font-weight:600;font-size:12px;text-align:center;%22>${item.priceSrv%20||%20%27&nbsp;%27}</td><td%20style=%22border-right:1px%20solid%20#000;border-bottom:1px%20solid%20#000;padding:4px;font-weight:600;font-size:12px;text-align:center;%22>${item.priceDiely%20||%20%27&nbsp;%27}</td></tr>%60).join(%27%27)}<!--Total%20Price%20Footer--><tr><td%20style=%22border-right:1px%20solid%20#000;padding:8px%2010px;font-size:16px;font-weight:900;background:#fdfdfd;%22>SPOLU%20v%20EUR</td><td%20style=%22border-right:1px%20solid%20#000;padding:8px;text-align:center;font-size:16px;font-weight:900;background:#fdfdfd;%22>${sumaZakaznik%20||%20%27&nbsp;%27}</td><td%20style=%22border-right:1px%20solid%20#000;padding:8px;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;background:#fdfdfd;%22>${resNo?%27<span%20style=%22color:#FF0000;font-weight:900;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:1px;%22>REZ</span>%27:%27%27}</td></tr></table></div><!--Right%20Sidebar%20Barcode%20Container(Printed%20vertically)--><div%20style=%22width:16px;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:6px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-evenly;align-items:center;%22><img%20src=%22https://bwipjs-api.metafloor.com/?bcid=code128&text=${encodeURIComponent(orderNo)}&scale=2&height=6&includetext=false&rotate=R%22%20style=%22max-height:48%;max-width:16px;object-fit:contain;%22>${resNo?%60<img%20src=%22https://bwipjs-api.metafloor.com/?bcid=code128&text=${encodeURIComponent(resNo)}&scale=2&height=6&includetext=false&rotate=R%22%20style=%22max-height:48%;max-width:16px;object-fit:contain;%22>%60:%27%27}</div></div>%60;let%20overlay=document.getElementById(%27custom-print-overlay%27);if(!overlay){overlay=document.createElement(%27div%27);overlay.id=%27custom-print-overlay%27;document.body.appendChild(overlay);let%20style=document.createElement(%27style%27);style.innerHTML=%60%20@media%20print{@page{size:A4%20portrait;margin:8mm;}html,body{margin:0!important;padding:0!important;max-width:100%;background:#fff;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;}body>*:not(#custom-print-overlay){display:none!important;}#custom-print-overlay{display:flex!important;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between;position:relative;width:100%;min-height:100vh;background:#fff;padding:0;margin:0%20auto;box-sizing:border-box;}}@media%20screen{#custom-print-overlay{display:none!important;}}%60;document.head.appendChild(style);}overlay.innerHTML=sgl?gen(true):(gen(false)+%27<div%20style=%22width:100%;height:0;border-bottom:1px%20dashed%20#888;margin:0.5vh%200;%22></div>%27+gen(false));setTimeout(()=>window.print(),1500);})();
